data.title: Add preconditions-validator-lib entry/exit hooks to implementation-plan SKILL.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Overview
Insert the entry and exit validator invocation blocks into implementation-plan SKILL.md. Makes T3's RED tests pass. The entry check runs at skill entry (after config resolution), the exit write runs just before STATUS:complete emission.

## File Impact
- Modify: plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md

## Implementation Notes
**Entry section** — insert after Config Resolution section:

```bash
# Stage-boundary preconditions entry check (Story 4)
source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib/preconditions-validator-lib.sh"
_dso_pv_entry_check "implementation-plan" "preplanning" "${STORY_ID}" || true
# Fail-open: diagnostic emitted on missing/invalid upstream PRECONDITIONS; skill proceeds
```

**Exit section** — insert just before the SKILL_EXIT breadcrumb (before STATUS emission):

```bash
# Stage-boundary preconditions exit write (Story 4)
_dso_pv_exit_write "implementation-plan" "${_UPSTREAM_EVENT_ID:-}" "${_IMPL_PLAN_SPEC_HASH:-}" "${STORY_ID}" || true
# Fail-open: self-check failure logged; never blocks skill completion
```

Both sections must be zero-user-interaction: no prompts, no stdin reads.
The entry check is fail-open (|| true) — a missing upstream PRECONDITIONS emits a diagnostic but does not block implementation-plan from proceeding (SC7).
The exit write is fail-open (|| true) — schema-roundtrip failure is logged but does not block STATUS emission.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 4 tests from T3 PASS after this edit
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preconditions-impl-plan-validator.sh 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL | grep -q "pass\|ok\|PASS"
- [ ] Entry section references _dso_pv_entry_check with "implementation-plan" and "preplanning"
  Verify: grep -q '_dso_pv_entry_check.*implementation-plan.*preplanning\|_dso_pv_entry_check.*"implementation-plan"' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] Exit section references _dso_pv_exit_write with "implementation-plan"
  Verify: grep -q '_dso_pv_exit_write.*implementation-plan' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] No interactive prompt pattern added to validator sections
  Verify: ! grep -A5 '_dso_pv_entry_check' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -q 'read -p\|/dev/tty'
- [ ] check-referential-integrity.sh passes (no dead path refs introduced)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" | tail -1 | grep -qi "ok\|pass\|0 errors"
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
